lever: Right-size the model (route each task to the smallest adequate model)
measured_effect: 10-70x energy difference between frontier-reasoning and small efficient models on identical prompts
evidence: Jegham et al. arXiv:2505.09598 (o3 vs GPT-4.1 nano >70x); AI Energy Score leaderboard spreads

lever: Cap reasoning/thinking budgets on bounded tasks
measured_effect: Reasoning modes average ~30x the energy of standard generation; explicit budgets recover most of it
Grid carbon intensity spans ~20x (30-40 gCO2e/kWh hydro/nuclear grids vs 600-750 coal-heavy)

lever: Bound output length; prompt and token discipline
measured_effect: Per-request energy is approximately linear in output tokens; halving median output roughly halves energy
evidence: Physics of autoregressive decoding; Luccioni et al. FAccT 2024

measured_effect: Eliminates recomputation of repeated prefixes; effect equals your cache hit rate

lever: Batch requests / schedule flexible jobs off-peak
measured_effect: Improves serving utilization; single-digit to low-double-digit % energy; larger carbon effect via diurnal grid variation
evidence: Serving-systems literature; grid CI diurnal data

lever: Prefer providers that disclose measured footprints
measured_effect: Converts Tier-3/4 guesses into Tier-2 data (halves uncertainty); creates market pressure for transparency
evidence: GAIA principle P1; Google arXiv:2508.15734; Mistral LCA 2025

measured_effect: ~24% lower embodied carbon per FLOP (B200 vs H100); higher FLOPs/J in serving
